text:
New Patients Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: An indicator to identify providers who were accepting new patients; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: ACPTG_NEW_PTNTS_IND 

LONG NAME: ACPTG_NEW_PTNTS_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
8 = N/A — the individual only practices as a member of a group 

COMMENT: — 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
